  • Open

    KFC Brings Back $5 Bowls and Debuts New Cheese Curds
    KFC starts 2026 with the return of $5 Bowls for a limited time. It also debuts new Cheese Curds. This round of $5 Bowls includes the following options: - New Matty's Cheesy Nuggy Gravy Bowl - Created in partnership with Canadian chef/actor Matty Matheson, the Cheesy Nuggy Gravy Bowl takes inspiration from poutine and features Secret Recipe fries topped with chicken nuggets, fried cheese curds, and brown gravy. - Mac & Cheese Bowl - Homestyle mac & cheese topped with chicken nuggets and a three-cheese blend (cheddar, mozzarella, and pepper jack). - Spicy Mac & Cheese Bowl - Homestyle mac & cheese topped with chicken nuggets, a three-cheese blend, and Nashville Hot Sauce. - Mashed Potato Bowl - Mashed potatoes topped with gravy, corn, chicken nuggets, and a three-cheese blend. - Spicy Mashed Potato Bowl - Mashed potatoes topped with gravy, corn, chicken nuggets, a three-cheese blend, and Nashville Hot Sauce. KFC's new Cheese Curds feature battered and fried Wisconsin-style white cheddar cheese curds. A 10-piece order costs $4.19 near me in Los Angeles. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Dairy Queen Welcomes New Oreo Snowdrift Blizzard and Mocha Brownie Mudslide Blizzard
    Dairy Queen launches two new Blizzards this month: the Oreo Snowdrift Blizzard and the Mocha Brownie Mudslide Blizzard. They're joined by the returning Choco-Dipped Strawberry Blizzard. The Oreo Snowdrift Blizzard is a winter-themed treat that features vanilla soft serve mixed with Oreo cookie pieces and a sky-blue cake batter sauce, topped and stirred with a marshmallow sauce. The Mocha Brownie Mudslide Blizzard is a coffee-inspired dessert that features vanilla soft serve blended with brownie pieces, chocolaty chunks, and coffee. The Choco-Dipped Strawberry Blizzard evokes the warmer days of summer and features vanilla soft serve mixed with strawberry topping and chocolaty chunks. All three Blizzards are available now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    Aldi Finds for January 2026
    It's a new year, and Aldi has revealed its Aldi Finds release schedule for January 2026. As is typical of this time of year, the lineup features a selection of healthier options alongside the regular seasonal fare and Valentine's Day treats. Here's what the schedule looks like: Available starting January 7, 2026: Sundae Shoppe No Sugar Added Gelato - $3.79 Simply Nature Organic Tart Cherry Juice - $5.69 Fusia Asian Inspirations Mini Wontons - $6.49 Mama Cozzi's Cauliflower Crust Roasted Veg Pizza - $4.99 Specially Selected Scallops in Sauce - $7.99 Simply Nature Organic Gluten Free Chicken Tenders - $8.99 Clancy's Reduced Fat Kettle Chips - $1.99 Available starting January 14, 2026: Southern Grove Whole Dipped Freeze Dried Strawberries or Raspberries - $5.49 Millville Decadent Granolas - $3.99 Barissimo Cupid's Brew Coffee Collection - $7.99 Choceur Love Around the World Assorted Chocolates Selection - $4.99 Moser Roth Belgian Chocolate Truffle Hearts - $4.99 Moser Roth Belgian Dusted Truffles - $3.49 Aldi Mini Heart Marshmallows - $3.29 Simply Nature Acai Fruit Bowl - $3.29 L'Oven Fresh Overnight Oats Bread - $3.99 Reggano Valentine's Day Pasta - $2.49 Kirkwood Heart-Shaped Chicken Nuggets (pictured) - $6.29 Fremont Fish Market Crab or Lobster Cakes - $4.99 Mama Cozzi's Beef Brisket or Chicken and Jalapeno Pizza - $5.99 Available starting January 21, 2026: Lunch Buddies Crustless Strawberry PB&J Sandwich - $3.69 Fusia Asian Inspirations Crunchy Rice Rolls - $2.99 Appetitos Crab Rangoon or Cream Cheese Wontons - $3.69 Appetitos Mini Tacos - $5.99 Clancy's Buffalo Wing or Parmesan Garlic Kettle Chips - $1.99 Available starting January 28, 2026: Kirkwood Southern Chicken Variety Pack - $8.99 Appetitos Breaded Cheese Curds - $5.49 Fremont Fish Market Breaded Crunchy Shrimp - $5.99 Appetitos Pretzel Bites - $2.99 Photo via Aldi. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Crumbl's Weekly Rotating Menu Through January 10, 2026
    Entering the new year, Crumbl has switched up its weekly rotating dessert menu so that there is now a permanent Classics Menu with six flavors and four rotating "specialties" each week. From January 5 through January 10, 2026, the limited-time desserts at Crumbl include: - New Dubai Biscoff Brownie - A chocolate brownie topped with a kataifi and Biscoff cookie butter filling, a white drop layer, and a drizzle of Biscoff cookie butter. - New Chocolate Vanilla Ice Cream Swirl Cookie - A brown sugar cookie packed with waffle cone bites, topped with a chocolate-vanilla mousse swirl and more waffle cone bites. - New Oatmeal Marshmallow Cookie - A spiced oatmeal cookie topped with marshmallow cream cheese frosting. - Ultimate Peanut Butter Cookie - A warm peanut butter cookie stuffed with peanut butter and topped with a melted peanut butter drizzle. The permanent Classics Menu includes the following cookies: - Semi-sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie filled with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. - Pink Sugar Cookie - An almond sugar cookie topped with a pink almond frosting. - Chocolate Crumb Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm chocolate cookie made with Oreo cookie pieces, topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and more Oreo cookie pieces.  - Brownie Batter Cookie - A warm chocolate cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chips and topped with brownie batter. - Snickerdoodle Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie rolled in a cinnamon-sugar coating. - Celebration Cake Cookie - A warm cake batter cookie topped with cake batter cream cheese frosting and rainbow sprinkles. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Will It Creami? Wendy's Chocolate Frosty
    As I mentioned earlier on the BrandEating Patreon, I received a Ninja Swirl Creami ice cream maker to experiment with courtesy of SharkNinja. I'm going to use it to see how and if various fast-food desserts could be made into ice cream or soft serve. I decided to start off with something easy: Turning Wendy's Chocolate Frosty into soft serve. It's almost soft serve already, so I figured, why not? I'm calling the segment, "Will it Creami?" ("Will it Swirl Creami" just doesn't sound right) The Process  I purchased a large Wendy's Frosty for $3.59 and let it melt slightly to reduce its volume. I then poured it into the Creami's supplied pint container and placed it into the freezer for a little over a day. After it was good and frozen, I ran it through the processing section of the Cremi (it took four minutes), which finely shaves and blends the frozen Frosty into a soft serve consistency (it's like the reverse of your typical ice cream maker, where you churn and freeze the ice cream at the same time). Once it was churned, I attached the container to the soft serve dispensing section of the Creami. There, it was forced/pressed the Frosty soft serve through a nozzle to achieve that signature swirled look. If you don't want/need to have that swirled soft serve appearance, you can skip this step and just spoon the soft serve out of the container. How it turned out The Wendy's Frosty Soft Serve was pretty good. Obviously, it had the same mild chocolate and hint of vanilla flavor of a regular Frosty, but it also had the firmer, smoother, less melty texture of soft serve (my dispensing skills need improvement, however). It was a little too firm, though, and I wonder if that was due to the relatively low fat content of a Frosty (fat/cream makes ice cream softer) or if I should have given the soft serve another blend (there's a "re-spin" function on the machine). Still, the firmness wasn't outside the range of other soft serves that I've eaten. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Jersey Mike's Offers $10.99 Boardwalk Bundle
    Jersey Mike's introduces a limited-time meal deal called the Boardwalk Bundle. Priced at $10.99, the Boardwalk Bundle includes a regular #2 sub (AKA the Jersey Shore's Favorite), a small bag of chips, and a 22-oz fountain beverage. The #2 sub consists of provolone, ham, and cappacuolo, plus your choice of veggies, condiments, and bread. Prices vary, but it normally costs $9.95 here in Los Angeles (which amounts to a bag of chips and a drink for $1). The Boardwalk Bundle is available now at participating Jersey Mike's locations. Photo via Jersey Mike's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Arby's Introduces New Meat & 3 Box Meal
    Arby's launches a new discounted value meal called the "Meat & 3 Box." For $7.99, the Meat & 3 Box includes a Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich, three sides (two Mozzarella Sticks, a Peach Cobbler Roll, and small fries), and a small fountain drink. There's also a $9.99 option that swaps in a French Dip & Swiss sandwich in place of the Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich. Arby's Meat & 3 Box is available now for a limited time. Photo via Arby's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    PB&J Cookies Return to Insomnia Cookies
    Late-night cookie chain Insomnia Cookies welcomes back two limited-time flavors to kick off 2026: the PB&J Filled Classic Cookie made with Jif and the Fruity Cereal 'N Milk Filled Classic Cookie. The PB&J Filled Cookie is a peanut butter cookie made with Jif peanut butter and filled with grape jelly. The Fruity Cereal 'N Milk Filled Classic Cookie is a warm, fruity cereal cookie filled with cereal-milk buttercream. Prices vary, but they cost $3.69 each here in Los Angeles. Insomnia Cookies is currently offering a limited-time deal where you can get free delivery on orders of $20+ using the code "DREAMON". Photo via Insomnia Cookies. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Taco Bell Tests Supreme and Loaded Taco Nacho Fries
    Taco Bell is testing "Everyday Nacho Fries" for a limited time at participating locations in the Charlotte, NC area. Everyday Nacho Fries include Supreme Nacho Fries and Loaded Taco Nacho Fries. The test locations appear to be serving one or the other, but not both. Each is priced at $4.99. Supreme Nacho Fries feature seasoned fries topped with seasoned beef, Spicy Ranch sauce, warm nacho cheese sauce, reduced-fat sour cream, diced tomatoes, and a 3-cheese blend (mozzarella, pepper jack, and cheddar). Loaded Taco Nacho Fries feature seasoned fries topped with seasoned beef, warm nacho cheese sauce, shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, shredded cheddar cheese, Spicy Ranch sauce, and crispy Fiesta Strips. Loaded Taco Nacho Fries were previously released nationally as a limited-time item, while Supreme Nacho Fries are very similar to the limited-time Nacho Fries Supreme that accompanied the initial launch of Taco Bell's Nacho Fries. Given the "everyday" moniker, it looks like Taco Bell is exploring adding a topped Nacho Fries dish to its menu permanently. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Nothing Bundt Cake Reveals Limited-Time Cakes for January and February 2026
    Cake bakery chain Nothing Bundt Cakes reveals its upcoming limited-time selection of bundt cakes in January and February 2026. The upcoming lineup is as follows: - Biscoff Cookie Butter Cake - A returning flavor that sold out at 233 locations during its 2025 debut, the Biscoff Cookie Butter Cake features a spice cake with Biscoff Cookie Butter baked into the batter and Biscoff cookies baked into its base and layered on top. Biscoff Cookie Butter is also drizzled on top. The flavor is available from January 5 through February 15, 2026, while supplies last in all cake sizes - New-Fashioned Marble With Chocolate Frosting -  A yellow-and-chocolate marble cake topped with chocolate ganache cream cheese frosting (this is the first time that Nothing Bundt Cakes has offered a chocolate frosting) and chocolate-coated wafers. It's available from January 12 through January 25, 2026, in Bundtlet size only, while supplies last. - New Chocolate Raspberry Heart Made with Dove (pictured) - Ready for Valentine's Day, this chocolate cake is filled with raspberry puree and topped with signature cream cheese frosting, a drizzle of raspberry puree, and a Dove chocolate heart. It's available from February 2 through February 15, 2026, in Bundtlet size only, while supplies last. Photo via Nothing Bundt Cakes. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

    Wendy's Offers 1-Cent Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger with Purchase on December 30, 2025
    Wendy's celebrates National Bacon Day today, December 30, 2025, with a deal where you can get a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger for $0.01 with any purchase. The offer is available at participating locations nationwide when signed in on the Wendy's app or website. Wendy's Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger features a square beef patty, two strips of bacon, American cheese, lettuce, tomato, and mayo, served on a toasted bun. Prices vary, but it normally costs $3.49 near me in Los Angeles. Photo via Wendy's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    2026 New Year's Deals and Specials
    2026 is coming in fast, and some eateries are celebrating with promotions for your dining dollars. Here's a list of 2026 New Year's fast-food deals and specials: - Crumbl - On December 31, 2025, get a 6-pack for the price of a 4-pack. - Del Taco - Through February 9, 2026, Del Taco is offering a deal where you can get two Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3. - KFC - Through January 5, 2026, there's a buy-one-get-one-free deal on 8-piece fried chicken buckets for KFC rewards members. - Krispy Kreme - From December 30, 2025, through January 1, 2026, you can get two dozen donuts for $20.26 at participating locations chain-wide. Choose either two Original Glazed Dozens or one Original Glazed and one Assorted Dozen. The chain is also offering free delivery on orders over $5. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    $6 Fish & Chicken Basket Returns to Long John Silver's
    The $6 Fish & Chicken Basket is back at Long John Silver's for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide. The discounted combo meal includes a battered and fried piece of wild-caught Alaska pollock, a Chicken Plank (a battered and fried white-meat chicken tender), a side, and two hush puppies. Photo via Long John Silver's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Little Caesars Offers Two Large 1-Topping Pizzas for $4.99 Each
    Little Caesars is offering an online-only, limited-time deal where you can get two large 1-topping pizzas for $4.99 each ($9.98 total). The offer is $1 more per pizza (i.e., $5.99 each) in a few markets (including California). You can redeem the offer using the code "PIZZAPIZZA" ("PIZZAPIZZA1" in the more expensive markets). It is only good on the chain's original round crust. The code is a nod to when Little Caesars' signature deal was the "Pizza! Pizza!" deal, which eventually gave way to the $5 Hot-N-Ready promotion, which ended in 2022. Photo via Little Caesars. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Arby's Debuts New Italian Beef Dip
    Arby's introduces its take on an Italian beef sandwich with the launch of the new Italian Beef Dip. The chain also adds a new Peach Cobbler Roll. Available for a limited time, the new sandwich features thin-sliced roast beef, Swiss cheese, and giardiniera, served on a warm sub roll with au jus for dipping. It's basically Arby's French Dip, only with the addition of giardiniera. Prices vary, but the Italian Beef Dip costs $7.19 (versus $7.09 for a French Dip) at an Arby's restaurant here in Los Angeles. The new Dip differs slightly from the test item from last year. It now includes cheese and lacks the premium top round roast beef that was being tested. The Peach Cobbler Roll is a new, limited-time dessert that comes two to an order. It features a rolled-up crispy pastry stuffed with peaches, graham cracker, and bourbon vanilla filling. An order costs $2.89 near me. Photos via Arby's. Nutritional Info - Arby's Italian Beef Dip (343g) Calories - 680 Fat - 37g (Saturated Fat - 13g) Sodium - 2900mg Carbs - 52g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 35g Nutritional Info - Arby's Peach Cobbler Roll - 2 pieces (105g) Calories - 350 Fat - 16g (Saturated Fat - 6g) Sodium - 570mg Carbs - 46g (Sugar - 16g) Protein - 4g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

    Crumbl Bakes New Strawberry Brownie and More Through January 3, 2026
    Crumbl bakes new Strawberry Brownie and more for this week from December 29, 2025, through January 3, 2026. With the new year arriving this week, the cookie bakery chain is also offering a deal on December 31, 2025, where you can get a 6-pack of cookies for the price of a 4-pack. Here's what you'll find on the dessert rotation at Crumbl this week: - New Strawberry Brownie - A chilled fudge brownie infused with freeze-dried strawberry pieces, topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting, fresh strawberry slices, and a white drizzle. - Birthday Cake Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm cookie made with Oreo cookie pieces, topped with cake batter cream cheese frosting, more Oreo pieces, and rainbow sprinkles. - New York Cheesecake Cookie - A chilled buttery graham cracker cookie topped with vanilla cheesecake frosting and graham cracker streusel. - Nilla Bean Cupcake Cookie - A warm vanilla bean cookie topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and white sprinkles. - S'mores Skillet Cookie featuring Hershey's Chocolate - A warm, graham cookie baked with pieces of Hershey's Chocolate, topped with marshmallow mousse, a drizzle of melted chocolate, and graham cracker streusel. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. - Waffle Cookie - A warm waffle cookie topped with a scoop of buttercream frosting and served with a side of syrup. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
